grid.bento_projects: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(250px,auto)]

hero.style: Terminal simulation layout. Wrap the content in a div that looks like a macOS/Linux terminal window (header bar with 3 dots: red, yellow, green). Content inside should have monospace fonts for command simulation.
hero.animation: Typewriter effect for the main headline or command input.

about.style: Code editor split view. Left side shows line numbers (1, 2, 3...) in text-secondary color. Right side shows the actual 'About Me' text styled like JSON or YAML configuration.
about.layout: Grid layout with text on one side and the author's portrait on the other.

projects.style: Control Room Grid. Cards have pure solid #111827 backgrounds with 1px border-[#1E293B]. On hover, border turns to primary color (#10B981) and adds a subtle drop-shadow glow.
projects.tags: Tech stack tags must look like terminal badges (bg-primary/10 text-primary border border-primary/20 text-xs font-monospace px-2 py-1 rounded).

testimonials.style: Server log output style. Testimonials displayed as terminal execution logs, e.g., '[SUCCESS] Executed feedback.sh - user: Colleague Name'.

navigation.style: Sticky crystal glass header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0E17]/80, border-b border-[#1E293B]. Nav links use JetBrains Mono.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-[#0A0E17] font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-emerald-400 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-primary border border-primary px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors font-monospace

images.description: Modern server room with blue illumination. Use as a very low opacity background (e.g. 5-10%) behind the hero section.
Software engineer portrait for the About Me section. Apply a grayscale or heavy dark-blue tint filter via CSS to match the theme.

icons.instruction: Use Terminal, Server, Cloud, Cpu, Code, Command, GitBranch icons heavily.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming convention.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark terminal theme. NO generic purple or teal gradients.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the Hero section to build the Terminal window wrapper.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for subtle fade-ins and standard transitions.
Install and use 'react-type-animation' for the hero typing effect.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards. Use custom div structures with 1px borders to maintain the technical dashboard feel.
Ensure high contrast: text should be bright against the dark #0A0E17 background.
Add 'data-testid' to every button, link, and form input.
